notable_excerpts: The green energy portfolio is trending towards being nearly half of our domestic business.
The electric portfolio which continues to expand meaningfully recorded sales of almost 100,000 units.
Freedom, the world's first CNG motorcycle continues its steady growth.
We are going to accelerate this growth by having a whole lot of engagement, both in terms of communication and direct engagement with customers.
We have expanded the range with one more variant making it a portfolio of three, which should cover all segments of users from gig workers to long-distance personal users.
Profit after tax on a stand-alone basis came in at over INR2,100 crores for the quarter.
Going forward, in export, we still need to be watchful of the currency-led volatility, particularly in South Asia and Africa.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, focusing on the expansion of the green energy portfolio and electric vehicles. Social aspects are moderately covered with emphasis on customer and community engagement. Governance mentions are present but less detailed, focusing on financial performance and risk management.
strengths: Strong focus on green energy and electric vehicles
